sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3294" key="a)kolouqi/skos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκολουθ-ίσκος</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="dim" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Dim. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἀκόλουθος</foreign>, <sense id="n3294.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">foot-boy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1645.tlg001:6" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.Euerg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
